BusinessProfile.Name: Nicky's Manicure & Pedicure
BusinessProfile.Tagline: Luxury nail care, timeless beauty, and attentive service in Cape Town.
BusinessProfile.Description: Nicky's Manicure & Pedicure offers luxury manicure and pedicure services with thoughtful care, elegant finishing, and a calm premium experience designed for women who value polish, hygiene, and consistency.
BusinessProfile.HeroHeadline: Luxury manicure and pedicure care for polished, confident women.
BusinessProfile.HeroSubheadline: Book a calm, premium salon experience in Cape Town with elegant finishes, attentive care, and beautifully presented results for everyday wear, events, and special occasions.
